data.body:
[operator-attested] LIVE CALIBRATION PASS — project.portability meets every release threshold on the first complete run (no rubric tuning needed).

Command: .venv/bin/rebar criteria eval project.portability --runs 3 --output json
Model: anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6 (pinned in the eval spec)
Runs (epochs): 3
UTC: started 2026-07-17T03:19:50Z, completed 2026-07-17T03:24:23Z (all 24 calls succeeded; no timeout/API error/partial result)
Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-reb-1003, branch jira-reb-1003-portability
Base: origin/main cb0f8ec3b (includes the landed eval-resolution fix, bug 2340) + stack head 93f593b4f

Aggregate metrics (dataset fire/no-fire, 8 cases): n_fire=4, n_nofire=4, recall=1.0, false_accept=0.0, agreement=1.0, Cohen kappa=1.0, per-case stability min=1.0 mean=1.0.
Release thresholds required: recall 1.0 (met), false_accept 0.0 (met), agreement 1.0 (met), per-case stability >= 0.6666666667 (met, 1.0), kappa >= 0.70 (met, 1.0).

Per-case (expected_fire / observed_fire / stability):
- PORT-F1 Gerrit-only landing: fire / fire / 1.0
- PORT-F2 Python-only diff criteria: fire / fire / 1.0
- PORT-F3 macOS security binary: fire / fire / 1.0
- PORT-F4 Path.cwd() unrestricted-fs MCP: fire / fire / 1.0
- PORT-N1 silent portable filter: no-fire / no-fire / 1.0
- PORT-N2 project-config coaching: no-fire / no-fire / 1.0
- PORT-N3 CLI-scoped color: no-fire / no-fire / 1.0
- PORT-N4 explicit-path std-lib discovery: no-fire / no-fire / 1.0

Note: the live-eval AC was previously blocked by bug 2340 (namespaced project criteria failed to resolve in the eval path). That fix landed on main as Gerrit change 751 (Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1, MERGED) as an INDEPENDENT change; this stack was rebased onto it, unblocking the run above.
